x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Console app for creating Json Web Keys

options.name: --store
options.description: The JWKs store to use. Either a directory or an Azure Key Vault URI [default: .]

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create a new key and add it to a keyset

options.name: --environment
options.description: Comma-separated list of Json Web Key Set environments to use [default: Test, Prod]

options.name: --algorithm
options.description: The algorithm to use for the key [default: RS256]

options.name: --suffix
options.description: Optional suffix to append to the key ID [default: CgGZ]

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Name of the integration to generate a new key for

commands.name: key
commands.description: Export the current private or public key

options.name: --environment
options.description: Json Web Key Set environment to use [default: Test]

options.name: --variant
options.description: Decides whether to export the private or the public key [default: Private]

options.name: --base64
options.description: Outputs the base64 version of the key [default: False]

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Name of the key to export
